verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You came like the wind Took me to a mountain From a valley of sin And my soul patiently waits For I long to be near you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, Savior You changed the rhythm of my heart And I will praise You Long after the rivers all run dry And I will love You forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Long after the rivers all run dry Long after the rivers all run dry And I will love You forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Love You forever Love You forever Love You forever Love You forever
